entries.value: اےک واضح سامنے والا بھاگ جو اےک خیال پوچھتا ہے۔

entries.value: اےک عام جال جو سںبھاوِت گلتی سے ساودھان کرتا ہے۔

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: اےک سںکشِپت پِچھلا بھاگ جو خیال کو پورا کرتا ہے۔

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: اےسا اشارہ جو سب کچھ بتااے بغیر مدد کرے۔

entries.value: اےک review choice so missed cards return sooner.

entries.value: اےک simple فلیش کارڈ ورک فلو

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: یادداشت: کے لیے A stronger card asks

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: اےک useful card asks one thing. It should نہیں hide five questions inside one پرامپٹ. It should be specific enough کے لیے answer, but نہیں so narrow that it becomes meaningless.

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: اےک weak AI فلیش کارڈ says:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: فعال یاد دہانی

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: Add hints بغیر giving away answer

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI can help make فلیش کارڈ faster, but سیکھنا still comes from retrieval. If tool writes cards اور learner never struggles کے لیے answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused پرامپٹ, then makes learner recall before revealing answer.

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval پرامپٹ. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, اور identify traps اےک learner might miss.

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI فلیش کارڈs اور فعال یادداشت: how کے لیے remember more

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: کسی تصور کو چھوٹے مثال پر لاگو کرےں۔

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: one-idea cards with hints and common traps. کے لیے Ask

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the جواب after some forgetting, which strengthens later recسب."

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: دو خیالات کی موازنہ کریں;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: اےک الفاظ پرِبھاشِت کریں;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: بہت ویاپک یا بہت واضح کارڈ ہٹااےں۔

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: Do not review ہرthing equسبy

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: آسان۔ اسے بعد میں آگے بڈھااےں۔

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: اےک وجہ سمجھائیں;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this۔

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place۔

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, answers reveal کرتے ہیں only effort کے بعد, and review missed cards جلدی۔

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: For a گہری route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a سُںدر deck. The goal is زیادہ یاد رکھنا when the notes ہٹ جانے پر۔

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: مثال کے لیے:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front side: "spaced review cramming سے بہتر کیوں کام کرتا ہے?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: Hard. Review after a short delay۔

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "forgetting اور retrieval کے بارے میں سوچےں۔"

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space۔

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: identify a common mistake; دیکھیں

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt۔

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks۔

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: Missed. Review soon۔

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners کی اےک mistake is ہر card کو اےک جےسا treat کرنا. If you know a card instantly, اسے کل پھر review کرنا سمی کھراب کر سکتا ہے. If you miss a card, اےک week رُکنا بہت لںبا ہو سکتا ہے.

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: Pair flashcards with understanding۔

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder۔

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food۔

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: recall کو ایمانداری سے rate کریں.

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test۔

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: remember a sequence;۔

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: without looking at the back. دہرائیں

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: مضبوط cards میں اکسر یہ شامل ہوتے ہیں:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: study skills مہارت

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: وہ hint learner کو یاد کرنے کی کرِیا ہٹااے بغیر شروع کرنے میں help کرتا ہے۔ inspir کا Flashcard Builder اِسی reveal-and-rate loop کے لیے designed ہے: پہلے try کریں, پھر reveal کریں, ایمانداری سے rate کریں, پھر weak cards کو جلدی واپس لااےں۔

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work۔

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: learner کو یاد کرنا پھر بھی کھُد کرنا پڈتا ہے۔ یہی point ہے۔

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: second card learner سے relationship retrieve کرواتا ہے, صرف sentence recognize نہیں کرواتا۔ اچچھے cards آمتور پر اِنمےں سے کسی اےک job پر focus کرتے ہیں:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: یہ complicated ہونے کی جرورت نہیں۔ important part یہ ہے کہ آپ کا review schedule memory کے مطابق respond کرے, deck کو static list کی ترہ نہ treat کرے۔

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: اسے Flashcard Builder میں آجمااےں۔ اگر کارڈ بنانے سے پہلے موضوع سمجھنا ہے, تو Learn Anything میں شروع کرےں۔ کارڈ کی دہرائی کے بعد دباو والا مشق چاہیے, تو Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice پر جااےں۔

entries.value: notes into better cards میں بدلیں

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: repeated misses into a سوال for سیکھیں Anything. میں بدلیں

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: اُپیوگ کریں: this loop:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: اُپیوگ کریں: three ratings:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: کیا is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: کیا makes a good فلیش کارڈ

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: کب you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs۔ A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph۔

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: AI کہاں مدد کرتا ہے
